ddls:
CREATE TABLE "system_tree" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system or subsystem */,
  "parent_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent system (null if it is a root system) */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system or subsystem */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the system (e.g., Root, SubSystem) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system or subsystem */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the system */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_tree_parent_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_system_id") REFERENCES system_tree ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "obj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsystem the state belongs to */,
  "state_type" TEXT /* Type of the state (e.g., continuous, discrete) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the state (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "initial_value" REAL /* Initial value of the state */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the state */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, developer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "simulation_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the simulation */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the run belongs to */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation run */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the simulation run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation run was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the simulation run */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation run was last modified */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation run (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the result belongs to */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the simulation result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation result was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the simulation result */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation result was last modified */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Binary data of the simulation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access control entry belongs to */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the access control entry belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the simulation (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the access control entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control entry was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the access control entry */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
